title: psilotrichum humile
intro: Psilotrichum humile is a small, shrub-like plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is often referred to as "yerba humilde" and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, with its health benefits attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Psilotrichum humile is typically used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
